birthday-parties.title: Birthday Parties
birthday-parties.metaTitle: Birthday Party Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
birthday-parties.description: Celebrate your birthday at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Full buyouts, patio sections, and custom cocktail packages at 3704 Mission Blvd.
body: Miss B's Coconut Club is the best birthday party venue in Mission Beach — and honestly, one of the best in San Diego. The open-air bar, the tropical dining room, the pink umbrella patio, the copper flamingo taps. It's a venue that makes the birthday photos look as good as the night felt.
We offer full venue buyouts, partial section reservations, and patio-only configurations depending on your group size and vibe. Custom cocktail packages and curated menus available for all events.

corporate-events.title: Corporate Events
corporate-events.metaTitle: Corporate Event Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
corporate-events.description: Corporate events and company outings at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. The only outdoor bar venue on Mission Blvd for team events and client entertainment.
body: Miss B's Coconut Club is the corporate event venue that your team will actually be excited about. Not a hotel conference room. Not a generic restaurant private dining setup. A genuine Mission Beach experience at one of San Diego's most distinctive venues.
Company outings, client entertainment, team celebrations, and holiday parties. Our events team handles every detail so you can focus on the people in the room.

bachelorette-parties.title: Bachelorette Parties
bachelorette-parties.metaTitle: Bachelorette Party Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
bachelorette-parties.description: Bachelorette parties at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Tropical cocktails, flamingo taps, pink umbrellas, and a patio steps from the Pacific.
body: If you're planning a bachelorette party in San Diego, Miss B's Coconut Club is the answer. The tropical cocktails, the copper flamingo taps, the pink fringed umbrellas on the patio, the "In Love With The Coco" sign — it was practically designed for a bachelorette.

Mission Beach location means you're steps from the Pacific and within easy reach of Pacific Beach nightlife. We'll make sure the group has a reserved section, a cocktail package worth celebrating with, and a night that earns its own highlight reel.

full-venue-buyouts.title: Full Venue Buyouts
full-venue-buyouts.metaTitle: Full Venue Buyout Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
full-venue-buyouts.description: Full venue buyout at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. The entire bar, dining room, and patio exclusively yours for your event.
body: A full Miss B's buyout means the entire venue is yours — the open-air bar, the tropical dining room, the fire pit patio, and every copper flamingo tap handle on the wall. The whole thing. Exclusively for your event.
Our team works with you on every detail: custom menu, cocktail program, room configuration, and dedicated staff throughout. This is the ultimate Mission Beach private event experience.
includes: All three spaces — bar, dining room, patio
Full custom menu and cocktail program

rehearsal-dinners.title: Rehearsal Dinners
rehearsal-dinners.metaTitle: Rehearsal Dinner Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
rehearsal-dinners.description: Rehearsal dinners at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Casual-upscale, beach-adjacent, and Caribbean-inspired at 3704 Mission Blvd.
body: The night before the wedding should feel like the best kind of night out — somewhere that sets the tone for the celebration ahead. Miss B's Coconut Club is casual-upscale, genuinely memorable, and exactly the kind of place people talk about the next day.
Caribbean-inspired menu, full cocktail program, tropical dining room. Seated dinners up to 60 guests. The kind of rehearsal dinner that earns its own toasts.

milestone-celebrations.title: Milestone Celebrations
milestone-celebrations.metaTitle: Milestone Celebration Venue Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
milestone-celebrations.description: Milestone celebrations at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Anniversaries, graduations, retirements, and every reason to celebrate at 3704 Mission Blvd.
body: Anniversaries, retirements, graduations, promotions — every milestone deserves a venue that matches the occasion. Miss B's Coconut Club is the kind of place people remember, which means your celebration will be remembered too.
We configure the space to suit your group and your vision. Intimate seated dinners, cocktail receptions, or full venue buyouts. Whatever the milestone calls for.
